iterations.theme: Surrendering to God's Will and Active Participation in National Spiritual Renewal through the Marian Vow
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast forms a cohesive thematic unit, starting with theological foundations, moving to personal testimonies, and concluding with a call to action and future plans for the Marian Vow, all within a reasonable length for a single iteration.

The Act of Trust: Giving One's Will to God (Analogy of a Skilled Professional)
Finding Peace and Joy in God's Will

The Christian's Joy in Relationship with God

God Needs Only What You Can Give, He Will Provide What You Need
